# Amplifier Module Provider Azure OPENAI

A provider module that integrates Azure OpenAI Service with the Amplifier AI agent platform.

## Tech Stack
- Python 3.11+
- Part of the Amplifier framework ecosystem

## Development
```bash
pip install -e ".[dev]"
python -m pytest
```

## Structure
This is an Amplifier provider module that provides Azure OpenAI model integration.

## Conventions
- Follow existing code patterns
- Include type hints
- Write docstrings for public functions
